draft.title: Taccuino del giorno · 16 luglio 2026
draft.excerpt: Buone notizie dal Milan per i giovani talenti rossoneri, mentre l'Inter punta su Iddrissou. Delusione per l'Under 19 azzurra ai rigori.
draft.excerptEn: Good news from Milan for young Rossoneri talents, while Inter eyes Iddrissou. Disappointment for Italy's Under 19 on penalties.
draft.bodyIt:
**Francesco Camarda e Christian Comotto**
Continua la fiducia del Milan nei confronti dei suoi gioielli: il direttore tecnico Giuseppe Riso ha confermato che entrambi i giovani avranno un futuro importante nella rosa rossonera. Due talenti su cui contare per il progetto milanista verso il 2030. [fonte](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE16dFN1VHNIRlJGQXBwb3BBT0k0VllBN1NzVVQ0U3YxR2VFY0lPVE5PeWFVZ0s4VU50VnJPc2FVZzBQTTJMR0RrQTUyQjR5dWw5eFBSNWt2b0ZhaDNwVzNoY2J4ZEprUHZINXYxcElFVW5aRXF1VzdPODk1Qkw?oc=5)

**Jamal Iddrissou**
L'Inter continua a investire nei propri giovani: Iddrissou ha scelto di rimanere al club nerazzurro, rifiutando altre proposte. Un talento che la società ritiene possa diventare un riferimento per la nazionale italiana del domani. [fonte](https://news.google.?oc=5)

**Massimo Pessina**
In casa Bologna si lavora sulle scelte di mercato: la decisione definitiva su Pessina spetta al direttore Valles, in un momento cruciale per definire la rosa. Un giovane talento al centro delle valutazioni della società emiliana. [fonte](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxNUVIzY3V1RUEzaUFiMFdBc2J1Qm0ycUVvaGtVRjVxUHhFTmQwOGprYWkxUWs1VEJTTnVlY3daV19QYnZRYTJWZnhlTGliSnRKdVNxeFpScDEwdlJyT0xMTDZhRXlBUVJ0a0VuRk9VTm0tdTZlX1FHZHYxcjVoZkJXUC1BaHdwTnlDd2ZvOGRLc1J0Zw?oc=5)

**Under 19 azzurra**
Delusione cocente per i giovani della Nazionale: ai rigori l'Italia Under 19 non ha potuto accedere al Mondiale, con l'errore di Elimoghale che ha pesato nella decisione. Un'occasione mancata per i talenti azzurri verso l'appuntamento mondiale del 2030. [fonte](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPeVZlV3J4dngwLTN2dzRjNTd3YzdxWkZuc2dweThkMEk5V05tWjhlMUt2YXZOdnVmY3pTVl8yU1k4MmJBRjk3aFk4OWdaSWVScjRiR2JmLWZ3U0laLXV2NUE5ZXRqZTlYOFl5NGZQR1lXTWRydW5tbHpEc1ZfbFcya3JmNF9tYndqZ2xmZEo3MUE0dXdDRDhVSzEtelFrZHlOX2RmYVZGV09ndnhtYnc?oc=5)
draft.bodyEn:
**Francesco Camarda and Christian Comotto**
Milan continues to trust its young talents: technical director Giuseppe Riso has confirmed that both players will have an important future in the Rossoneri squad. Two prospects to rely on for the Milan project toward 2030. [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE16dFN1VHNIRlJGQXBwb3BBT0k0VllBN1NzVVQ0U3YxR2VFY0lPVE5PeWFVZ0s4VU50VnJPc2FVZzBQTTJMR0RrQTUyQjR5dWw5eFBSNWt2b0ZhaDNwVzNoY2J4ZEprUHZINXYxcElFVW5aRXF1VzdPODk1Qkw?oc=5)

**Jamal Iddrissou**
Inter continues to invest in its young players: Iddrissou has chosen to stay at the Nerazzurri club, turning down other offers. A talent the club believes could become a reference point for Italy's national team in the future. [source](https://news.google.?oc=5)

**Massimo Pessina**
At Bologna, market choices are being made: the final decision on Pessina rests with director Valles, in a crucial moment for squad definition. A young talent at the center of the Emilian club's evaluations. [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxNUVIzY3V1RUEzaUFiMFdBc2J1Qm0ycUVvaGtVRjVxUHhFTmQwOGprYWkxUWs1VEJTTnVlY3daV19QYnZRYTJWZnhlTGliSnRKdVNxeFpScDEwdlJyT0xMTDZhRXlBUVJ0a0VuRk9VTm0tdTZlX1FHZHYxcjVoZkJXUC1BaHdwTnlDd2ZvOGRLc1J0Zw?oc=5)

**Italy Under 19**
Bitter disappointment for the young national team: on penalties, Italy's Under 19 failed to reach the World Cup, with Elimoghale's error weighing on the outcome. A missed opportunity for Italian talents ahead of the 2030 World Cup. [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPeVZlV3J4dngwLTN2dzRjNTd3YzdxWkZuc2dweThkMEk5V05tWjhlMUt2YXZOdnVmY3pTVl8yU1k4MmJBRjk3aFk4OWdaSWVScjRiR2JmLWZ3U0laLXV2NUE5ZXRqZTlYOFl5NGZQR1lXTWRydW5tbHpEc1ZfbFcya3JmNF9tYndqZ2xmZEo3MUE0dXdDRDhVSzEtelFrZHlOX2RmYVZGV09ndnhtYnc?oc=5)
